candidate_llm_application: LLM attention boundary-layer separation: attention degrades when context length exceeds effective receptive field; periodic 'attention sink' tokens act as vortex generators delaying separation.

results.title: Attention Sink Long-Context: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on attention sink long-context, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (attention sink long-context); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (aerodynamics terms vs LLM terms).
